title: Help Us Address Pricing Discrepancies Across Retail Outlets
text:
The FCCPC is conducting a study on the gap between displayed prices and checkout charges across the retail sector in Nigeria. Your input will help identify the scale of the issue and guide measures to strengthen pricing transparency and consumer protection.

Please take a few minutes to complete the survey: https://forms.gle/WfSCcURcKZPLRNne9

Your responses are confidential and used strictly for research. Kindly share with others to support wider participation. 

Thank you.
